item.title: Did Social Media Help Solve A 20-Year-Old Cold Case!?
item.description: Exploring how social media played a role in solving a two-decade-old cold case, highlighting its impact on modern investigations and tips.

media:content.media:title: Did Social Media Help Solve A 20-Year-Old Cold Case!?
media:content.media:description: Exploring how social media played a role in solving a two-decade-old cold case, highlighting its impact on modern investigations and tips.

item.title: The Man Who Wanted To Become TV's 'Dexter'
item.description: A factual look at a man influenced by the TV series ‘Dexter,’ exploring his actions, motives, and the investigation that followed.

media:content.media:title: The Man Who Wanted To Become TV's 'Dexter'
media:content.media:description: A factual look at a man influenced by the TV series ‘Dexter,’ exploring his actions, motives, and the investigation that followed.

item.title: The Dad Who Took Revenge for His Son in Live Television
item.description: A father confronted a situation involving his son during a live broadcast, sharing his perspective and the events as they unfolded on air.

media:content.media:title: The Dad Who Took Revenge for His Son in Live Television
media:content.media:description: A father confronted a situation involving his son during a live broadcast, sharing his perspective and the events as they unfolded on air.
